message:
🌱 Add Google Search Console verification file (#1721)

Enables ownership verification for console.kubestellar.io in Google
Search Console, required before submitting the sitemap and requesting
indexing. The file is served as a static asset from web/public/.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+google-site-verification: google76fedc310dc4bbdd.html
\ No newline at end of file
